Skip to main content

Polymythcal

All opportunities
A public calendar for events and opportunities from Toronto through Kingston, Gananoque, Brockville, Cornwall, and Montréal, plus online and global deadlines.
Search by keyword, corridor city, confirmation, or category. Titles open stable Polymythcal pages; each listing keeps its official source.

Audit14 · 513 records · every uncertainty is qualified and remains visible.

How to use

Pick a filter or search. The list starts near today. Open a title for the stable Polymythcal page; use Official source for the organizer page.

Unconfirmed listings remain visible and state exactly what is missing. CFP = call for papers.

Browse by category
Audience and shortcut filters

Writing All Writing Kids Juniors Teens Grades 11 and 12
RSS
Calendar keyboard/ search, ←/→ move months or horizontal panels, Home today.
587 upcoming events
Showing opportunities near today. Descriptions say what each item is.
Loading current calendar data. Static listings are already below.

Leads needing details

Source-confirmed leads stay here until time and place are confirmed.

587 upcoming calendar entries are listed below. Use the controls above to filter them when JavaScript is available.
